phase.title: Analysis & Specification
phase.description: Clarify requirements and define stable conventions for file locations, naming, and JSON schema.

tasks.text: Confirm the exact email matching conditions (recipient, sender) and whether subject filters are needed
Define the canonical plan file path: plans/plan_strategy_[ISSUE_NUMBER].md
Define the canonical JSON task file path: input/task_phase1_issue_[ISSUE_NUMBER].json
Define the JSON schema for Phase 1 tasks (metadata, checklist array, expected output)
Define the HTML report template sections
Define how to handle redactions in report and generated files (use [REDACTED])

expected_output: A consistent naming convention, a fixed JSON schema, and a fixed HTML report format.
